sections.label: Chorus
lines: A lamdang mahmah itna, Pasian’ hong itna hi;
Kalvary ah Asi dinga, Honpa hong piakna

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Upna hangin ka Topa hi, A thokik Pasian’ Ta;
Sihna tawh kei hong tan zo hi, A si’n

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Itna in hong kicingsak a, Misiangte tung gen hi;
Jesuh upna hang bek inah, eite i suakta hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A umte aw, nuamin pai un, Vantung nopna hi;
Hih leitungah na om lai un, Na malep ding uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Satan vangliatna i zota, Tatsate’n la sa ni;
Khris i Topa, i kumpipa, eite gualzawhna hi
